metadata.title: ColorMinutes
metadata.description: Turn meetings into clear, color-coded minutes with motions, votes, and action items.

common.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

home.headline: Turn every meeting into
home.description: Upload a meeting recording or notes, and ColorMinutes pulls out motions, votes, and action items—minutes your team can read at a glance.
home.previewVoteText: Approve Q2 roadmap and staffing plan.
home.previewActionText: PM to circulate revised timeline by Friday.
home.previewNoteText: Budget discussion deferred to next week's finance review.

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Sign in to manage your meeting minutes.

register.title: Create your account
register.description: Start turning meetings into color-coded minutes.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link. In development, check the API console for the link.

resetPassword.invalidDescription: This password reset link is missing a token. Request a new one.
resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.description: Enter a new password for your account.
resetPassword.missingToken: Missing reset token. Use the link from your email.

meetings.title: Meetings
meetings.description: Upload a recording or notes to generate color-coded minutes.
meetings.loadError: Unable to load meetings. Please try again.
meetings.empty: No meetings yet. Add your first recording or notes to generate minutes.

editDescription.processing: Your file is being transcribed or processed.
editDescription.ready: Review and edit the extracted content below, then generate color minutes.
editDescription.generating: Color minutes are being generated from your content.
editDescription.failed: Processing failed. You can update the title and retry by re-uploading.

meetings.processingBanner: Transcribing or extracting text from your file…
meetings.generatingBanner: Generating color-coded minutes from your content…

publishDialog.title: Publish meeting
publishDialog.description: Choose how others can access these minutes.
publishDialog.publicDescription: Discoverable with a readable URL based on the meeting name. Search engines may index this page.
publishDialog.linkDescription: Unlisted URL using the meeting ID. Search engines will not index this page.
publishDialog.publishedDescription: Share this link with your team.

record.title: Record meeting
record.description: Use your microphone to record the meeting directly in the browser. We'll turn it into color-coded minutes.

upload.title: Upload meeting recording
upload.description: Add an MP3 or MP4 of your meeting. We'll produce color-coded minutes with motions, votes, and action items.

notes.title: Upload meeting notes
notes.description: Add a PDF of existing meeting notes. We'll extract and color-code motions, votes, and action items.

upload.dropAudio: or drag and drop MP3 or MP4
upload.dropPdf: or drag and drop your PDF

errors.choosePdf: Please choose a PDF file to upload.
errors.chooseAudio: Please choose an MP3 or MP4 file to upload.
errors.audioOnly: Only MP3 and MP4 files are supported.

recording.idleHint: Record your meeting using your device microphone. You can record up to 1 hour.
recording.micDenied: Microphone access was denied or is unavailable.
recording.noRecording: No recording available. Record audio before saving.

uploadProgress.title: Uploading…
uploadProgress.hint: Large recordings may take several minutes. Please keep this tab open.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.patchRequired: At least one of title or content is required.
